content_en:
There are several types of ‘Anbar: white, gray, red, yellow, green, blue, black and multicolored. The best type of the ‘Anbar is gray, then the blue and then the yellow in color, while the black ‘Anbar is the worst type.

People have conflicting opinions regarding the origin of ‘Anbar, where some people said that it is a plant that grows on the seabed and which sea reptiles eat and then discard to later be thrown on the seashore. Some people say that ‘Anbar is the waste of sea creatures that looks like cow manure. Some people even said that it is a type of foam that the sea discards on the shore. The author of the 'Qanoon' discounted the last two opinions but said that the amber might originate from an undersea spring.

‘Anbar is hot and dry and strengthens the heart, the mind and the senses. It In addition strengthens the body and helps relieve facial paralysis, hemiplegia (paralysis), phiegmy ailments, stomach and flatulence. ‘Anbar In addition helps open various clogs if it is used as an ointment or as a drink. When it is inhaled, ‘Anbar will relieve cold symptoms, headaches and migraines.

5. 'Ud (Indian Aloe Tree)

The Indian 'U’d comes in two types. One type is used for medicinal purposes, which is called Al-Kust and some people called it Al-Qust. We will mention this type under the letter Qaf’ The second type of 'Ud is called Aluwwah, aoe wood, which is used as perfume.

Imam Muslim narrated in his Sahih that Ibn "Umar used to bum dry aloe wood along with some Kafur (camphor), and states that the Messenger of Allah used to do the same. In addition, the Messenger of Allah has described the bounties that the people of Paradise will be enjoying, such as having the aloe wood.

The 'Ud is hot and dry in the third degree, opens the clogs and does away with gas. In addition, 'Ud dries unnecessary moisture while strengthening the intestines and brings relief and comfort to the heart. ‘Ud In addition helps the mind, sharpens the senses, constipates and helps relieve the enuresis, bed wetting that result from coldness of the prostate.

Ibn Samjun said, "There are several kinds of 'Ud, and they all carry the general name of Aluwwah. 'Ud is used in and out of the body and is bumed alone or with other substances. There is a medicinal significance when the 'Ud is mixed with Kafur (camphor), as each of them makes the other milder. In addition, burning the 'Ud helps

cleanse the air, which is one of the six necessary elements for the body's well-being."

It was reported that the 'Ados (lentils) was described as the lust of the Jews that they preferred over Manna and quails.

The 'Ados is the companion of garlic and onions. It is cold and dry and has two opposing effects, one that constipates and one that works as a laxative. The skin of the 'Ados is hot and dry in the third degree and In addition works as a laxative. The benefit in the lentils is concentrated in the peelings, and this is why whole lentils are more benefici2) than ground lentils, less heavy on the stomach and less harmful.

Lentils cause black bile and harm the melancholy profoundly, along with having a negative effect on the nerves and the eyesight.

‘Adas produces thick blood; and those who suffer from black bile should avoid eating it, for when they eat lentils excessively, the lentils will beget obsession, leprosy, quartran fever (a fever that occurs on every fourth day), and other ailments. However, eating lentils with chard and large amounts of grease will lessen their negative side effects. In addition, one should avoid eating

~———~ The Prophetic Medicine

lentils with sweets, because lentils could cause clogs in the liver in this case. Further, eating 'Ados on a regular basis causes harm to the eyesight because they are very dry. Lentils In addition cause urine retention, cold swellings and excessive flatulence. The best type of 'Ados is the fat, white 'Ados that digests faster.

Some ignorant people claimed that Prophet Tbrahim used to cook lentils for his guests. However, the Qura'an mentioned that he hosted his guests with a fat roasted calf.

The Ghaith is mentioned in the Qura'an in many instances. The word Ghaith is soft on the ear and delightful for the body and the soul. The ears like to hear the word Ghaith, while the hearts enjoy its falling.

Rainwater is the best type of water there is and the softest, most beneficial and most blessed. This is especially the case when the rainfall is accompanied by lightning and thunder and is then collected in mountainous areas.

Rainwater is lighter than the other types of water because it is fresh and did not remain on the ground for a

jong time, in which case it would acquire some of the earth's dryness and hard substances. This is why rainwater gets spoiled quickly because it is pure and light.

There are two opinions regarding which is softer and lighter: rainwater that fal{s :n the spring or winter.

Those who prefer winter rainwater say that in winter, the sun's heat is less and it thus evaporates the softest parts of the seawater. In addition, the air then would be clean and void of dust, and consequently, would not be polluted. Hence, rainwater will not dissolve any pollutants while falling, and this is why rainwater is the softest and the lightest.

Those who prefer spring rainwater say that the hot sun then evaporates heavy substances in the air and makes the air itself lighter and cleaner. In this case, rainwater will be the lightest and the softest, at a time when the plants, the trees and the air become ready to receive rainfall.

Ash-Shafey narrated * that Anas bin Malik said, "Once, we were with the Prophet sg when the rain fell. The Prophet b removed his outer garment (unti! the rain fell on him) saying:

It has just come from its Lord."

-——— The Prophetic Medicine

We mentioned the Prophet's guidance in invoking Allah for rain and stated that he used to seek the blessings [that Allah endows] in the rain when it falls.

The Letter Foo 1, Fatihah AJ-Kitab (the First Chapter in the Quran)

Fatihah is the mother of the Qura'an, the seven frequently recited Versus that the Prophet ste was given and the ultimate cure and beneficial remedy that contains the prefect Rugiah, Islamic prayer formula. The Fatihah is the key to acquiring the richness, success and strength. The Fatihah In addition removes sadness, depression, anguish and fear. Only those who appreciate the value of the Fatihah and give it its due consideration, reciting it as it should be recited and knowing the secret of its value as a medicine and as a cure, will acquire such bounties.

One of the Companions unveiled a few of the secrets of the Fatihah when he used it as a Rugyah for scorpion stings. The affected person was instantly cured and the Prophet sn asked the Companion:

"How did you know it is a cure?"

They are successful ones who uncover some of the secrets of the Fatihah and what it contains of Tawhid, knowing Allah and His Names, Attributes, Actions and

Decisions. Those who acquire knowledge of what the Fot/hoh contains of affirming the religion, Predestination, Resurrection, Allah's Oneness in worship and in Lordship and trusting and depending on He Who owns ail affairs, the praise and all pure things and to Whom everything must return. Those who acquire the habit of showing meekness to Allah seeking correct guidance which is the basis of the ultimate happiness in this and the Next Life. Those who acquire knowledge in the connection between the meanings contained in the Fatihah and acquiring the good and fending off the harm of both lives. Those who understand that their ultimate well-being and receiving the perfect Favor of Allah are all linked to implementing these meanings. It is they who will be able to substitute the Fatihah in place of many medicines and use it as an Islamic prayer formula {Rugiah), and will use it to open the doors of goodness and drive away the elements of evil.

Understanding this subject requires a new nature, a new heart and a new type of Faith. By Allah! You will not find any evil statement, nor misguiding innovation, but the Fatihah will contain what nullifies and refutes it with the best, most correct and most direct manner. In addition, you will not find a door that leads to acquiring divine knowledge, correct guidance of the heart and the remedy of the soul against its ills, but that the Fatihah will possess its key and the method to best use it. Finally,

——— The Prophetic Medicine

you will not find a path on which those who seek the Lord of the Worlds are passing, but you will find the Fatihah in its beginning and end.

By Allah! The Fatihah is much more important than what we have emphasized. The slave who holds fast ts the Fatihah, comprehends it in the proper manner, relies on it as a perfect remedy, a shield, immunity, and as a light of guidance. He understands its implications as they should be understood. It is he who will not fall into an innovation, or Shirk, or catch an ailment in the heart except briefly!

The Fatihah is the ultimate key for the treasures of the earth and Paradise, as well. But not every person knows how to use this key so as to have access to these treasures. If those who seek these treasures were able to uncover the secrets of this chapter [in the Qura'an] and acquire knowledge of its implications, they would add teeth to the key and would have easy access to these treasures.

We are certain of the statements that we have asserted herein because they are true. Allah has Perfect Wisdom in hiding the secrets [of Al-Fatihah'} from the hearts of the majority of humankind, just as He has a perfect Wisdom in hiding the treasures of the earth from them.

The hidden treasures of the earth are surrounded by the devils that stand between humankind and these treasures. Only the good souls will be able to defeat these devils with True Faith, which is the weapon that the devils cannot wiihstand. However, the majority of the souls of mankind are not of this type (are not truly faithful). Therefore, they cannot resist the evil or defeat them to acquire their possessions for, "Whoever kills a combatant will have His possessions.”

2. Faghiyah (Henna Blossom)

Faghiyah, henna blossom, is one of the best kinds of perfumes, Faghiyah is mild in its hotness and dryness and constipates mildly. When Faghiyah is placed between folded wool clothes it protects them from mold and mites. In addition, Faghiyah is used in ointments against facial paralysis and aneurysm (dilatation of a portion of the wall of an artery), while its oil helps the organs and relaxes the nerves.
content_id:
Ada beberapa jenis 'Anbar: putih, abu-abu, merah, kuning, hijau, biru, hitam, dan beraneka warna. Jenis 'Anbar terbaik adalah yang berwarna abu-abu, kemudian biru, lalu kuning, sedangkan 'Anbar hitam adalah jenis yang paling rendah kualitasnya.

Para ulama berbeda pendapat mengenai asal-usul 'Anbar. Sebagian berpendapat bahwa ia adalah tumbuhan yang tumbuh di dasar laut, dimakan oleh reptil laut lalu dikeluarkan dan akhirnya terdampar di tepi pantai. Sebagian lain berpendapat bahwa 'Anbar adalah kotoran makhluk laut yang menyerupai kotoran sapi. Ada pula yang berpendapat bahwa ia adalah sejenis buih yang dikeluarkan laut ke tepian. Pengarang kitab 'Qanoon' menolak dua pendapat terakhir, namun menyatakan bahwa 'Anbar mungkin berasal dari mata air di bawah laut.

'Anbar bersifat panas dan kering, menguatkan jantung, akal, dan indera. Selain itu ia menguatkan tubuh dan membantu meringankan kelumpuhan wajah, hemiplegia (lumpuh separuh badan), penyakit berdahak, sakit perut, dan perut kembung. 'Anbar juga membantu membuka berbagai sumbatan bila digunakan sebagai salep maupun minuman. Ketika dihirup, 'Anbar akan meringankan gejala pilek, sakit kepala, dan migrain.

5. 'Ud (Pohon Gaharu India)

'Ud India terbagi menjadi dua jenis. Jenis pertama digunakan untuk keperluan pengobatan, disebut Al-Kust dan ada yang menyebutnya Al-Qust. Jenis ini akan kami bahas di bawah huruf Qaf. Jenis kedua disebut Aluwwah, kayu gaharu, yang digunakan sebagai wewangian.

Imam Muslim meriwayatkan dalam Shahih-nya bahwa Ibnu 'Umar biasa membakar kayu gaharu kering bersama Kafur (kamper), dan menyatakan bahwa Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam juga melakukan hal yang sama. Selain itu, Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam telah menggambarkan berbagai kenikmatan yang akan dinikmati penduduk surga, di antaranya adalah kayu gaharu.

'Ud bersifat panas dan kering pada derajat ketiga, membuka sumbatan dan menghilangkan gas. Selain itu, 'Ud mengeringkan kelembapan yang tidak diperlukan sekaligus menguatkan usus, memberikan ketenangan dan kenyamanan pada jantung. 'Ud juga membantu akal, mempertajam indera, mengatasi diare, serta membantu meringankan enuresis (beser) akibat kedinginan pada prostat.

Ibnu Samjun berkata, "Ada beberapa jenis 'Ud dan semuanya dikenal dengan nama umum Aluwwah. 'Ud digunakan di dalam maupun luar tubuh, dan dapat dibakar sendiri maupun dicampur dengan bahan lain. Ada khasiat pengobatan ketika 'Ud dicampur dengan Kafur (kamper), karena masing-masing melembutkan efek yang lain. Selain itu, membakar 'Ud membantu

membersihkan udara, yang merupakan salah satu dari enam unsur penting bagi kesehatan tubuh."

Diriwayatkan bahwa 'Adas (lentil) digambarkan sebagai sesuatu yang sangat diinginkan oleh Bani Israil hingga mereka lebih memilihnya daripada mann dan salwa.

'Adas adalah pasangan bawang putih dan bawang merah. Ia bersifat dingin dan kering serta memiliki dua efek yang berlawanan: ada yang membuatnya bersifat konstipan dan ada yang bersifat laksatif. Kulit 'Adas bersifat panas dan kering pada derajat ketiga dan juga bersifat laksatif. Manfaat lentil terpusat pada kulitnya, itulah mengapa lentil utuh lebih bermanfaat daripada lentil yang digiling, lebih ringan di perut, dan kurang berbahaya.

Lentil menyebabkan empedu hitam dan sangat merugikan penderita melankolia, selain juga berdampak negatif pada saraf dan penglihatan.

'Adas menghasilkan darah yang kental; penderita empedu hitam sebaiknya menghindari mengonsumsinya, karena bila dimakan secara berlebihan, lentil akan menimbulkan obsesi, kusta, demam kuartana (demam yang datang setiap empat hari sekali), dan berbagai penyakit lainnya. Namun, mengonsumsi lentil bersama daun bit dan banyak lemak akan mengurangi efek negatifnya. Selain itu, hendaknya menghindari mengonsumsi

~———~ Thibbun Nabawi

lentil bersama makanan manis, karena dalam kondisi ini lentil dapat menyebabkan sumbatan pada hati. Lebih jauh, mengonsumsi 'Adas secara rutin merusak penglihatan karena sifatnya yang sangat kering. Lentil juga menyebabkan retensi urin, pembengkakan dingin, dan perut kembung yang berlebihan. Jenis 'Adas terbaik adalah 'Adas gemuk berwarna putih yang lebih cepat dicerna.

Sebagian orang yang tidak berpengetahuan mengklaim bahwa Nabi Ibrahim 'alaihis salam memasak lentil untuk para tamunya. Padahal Al-Quran menyebutkan bahwa beliau menjamu tamu-tamunya dengan seekor anak sapi yang gemuk dan dipanggang.

Ghaith disebutkan dalam Al-Quran dalam banyak tempat. Kata Ghaith terdengar lembut di telinga dan menyenangkan bagi jiwa dan raga. Telinga senang mendengar kata Ghaith, sementara hati bergembira saat hujan turun.

Air hujan adalah jenis air terbaik yang ada; paling lembut, paling bermanfaat, dan paling diberkahi. Hal ini terutama berlaku ketika hujan turun disertai kilat dan guntur, lalu ditampung di daerah pegunungan.

Air hujan lebih ringan dari jenis air lainnya karena bersifat segar dan tidak lama berada di tanah, yang bila demikian akan menyerap kekeringan dan zat keras dari bumi. Itulah mengapa air hujan cepat rusak karena kemurnian dan keringanannya.

Ada dua pendapat mengenai mana yang lebih lembut dan ringan: air hujan yang turun di musim semi ataukah di musim dingin.

Mereka yang lebih memilih air hujan musim dingin berpendapat bahwa pada musim dingin, panas matahari lebih lemah sehingga hanya menguapkan bagian paling lembut dari air laut. Selain itu, udara saat itu bersih dan bebas debu, sehingga tidak tercemar. Akibatnya, air hujan tidak akan melarutkan polutan apapun saat turun, dan itulah mengapa air hujan musim dingin paling lembut dan ringan.

Mereka yang lebih memilih air hujan musim semi berpendapat bahwa matahari yang panas menguapkan zat-zat berat di udara sehingga udara itu sendiri menjadi lebih ringan dan bersih. Dalam kondisi ini, air hujan akan menjadi yang paling ringan dan paling lembut, pada saat tumbuh-tumbuhan, pepohonan, dan udara pun telah siap menyambut turunnya hujan.

Asy-Syafi'i meriwayatkan bahwa Anas bin Malik radhiyallahu 'anhu berkata, "Suatu ketika kami bersama Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam ketika hujan turun. Maka Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam membuka pakaian luarnya (hingga hujan mengenai beliau) seraya bersabda:

Hujan ini baru saja datang dari Tuhannya."

-——— Thibbun Nabawi

Kami telah menyebutkan panduan Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam dalam memohon kepada Allah untuk menurunkan hujan, dan bahwa beliau biasa mencari keberkahan yang Allah anugerahkan dalam hujan ketika turun.

Huruf Fa — Fatihah Al-Kitab (Surah Pertama dalam Al-Quran)

Al-Fatihah adalah induk Al-Quran, tujuh ayat yang sering diulang yang diberikan kepada Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam, dan merupakan obat yang paling sempurna serta penawar yang paling bermanfaat yang mengandung ruqyah yang sempurna. Al-Fatihah adalah kunci untuk meraih kekayaan, keberhasilan, dan kekuatan. Al-Fatihah juga menghilangkan kesedihan, depresi, kesempitan, dan rasa takut. Hanya mereka yang menghargai nilai Al-Fatihah dan memberikan perhatian yang semestinya, membacanya sebagaimana seharusnya, dan mengetahui rahasia nilainya sebagai obat dan penyembuh, yang akan meraih berbagai keberkahan tersebut.

Salah seorang Sahabat menyingkap sebagian rahasia Al-Fatihah ketika ia menggunakannya sebagai ruqyah untuk sengatan kalajengking. Orang yang terkena sengatan itu langsung sembuh, dan Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam bertanya kepada Sahabat tersebut:

"Dari mana engkau tahu bahwa ia adalah obat?"

Merekalah orang-orang yang berhasil menyingkap sebagian rahasia Al-Fatihah beserta kandungannya berupa tauhid, pengenalan terhadap Allah, Nama-nama-Nya, Sifat-sifat-Nya, Perbuatan-perbuatan-Nya, dan

Keputusan-keputusan-Nya. Mereka yang memperoleh pengetahuan tentang apa yang terkandung dalam Al-Fatihah berupa penegasan agama, takdir, kebangkitan, keesaan Allah dalam ibadah dan dalam rububiyah, serta bertawakal dan bergantung kepada Dia yang memiliki seluruh urusan, segala pujian, dan segala hal yang suci, dan kepada-Nya segala sesuatu akan kembali. Mereka yang membiasakan diri menundukkan diri kepada Allah seraya memohon petunjuk yang benar, yang merupakan landasan kebahagiaan hakiki di dunia dan di akhirat. Mereka yang memperoleh pengetahuan tentang keterkaitan antara makna-makna yang terkandung dalam Al-Fatihah dengan perolehan kebaikan dan penolakan bahaya di kedua kehidupan. Mereka yang memahami bahwa keselamatan tertinggi mereka dan penerimaan Karunia Allah yang sempurna semuanya terkait dengan pengamalan makna-makna ini. Merekalah yang akan mampu menjadikan Al-Fatihah sebagai pengganti banyak obat-obatan, menggunakannya sebagai ruqyah, serta menggunakannya untuk membuka pintu-pintu kebaikan dan mengusir unsur-unsur kejahatan.

Memahami hal ini memerlukan fitrah baru, hati yang baru, dan jenis iman yang baru. Demi Allah! Tidaklah engkau menemukan pernyataan yang buruk, tidak pula bid'ah yang menyesatkan, melainkan Al-Fatihah mengandung apa yang membatalkan dan membantahnya dengan cara yang paling baik, paling benar, dan paling langsung. Selain itu, tidaklah engkau menemukan pintu yang menuju perolehan ilmu ketuhanan, petunjuk yang benar bagi hati, dan penyembuhan jiwa dari penyakit-penyakitnya, melainkan Al-Fatihah memiliki kuncinya dan cara terbaik untuk menggunakannya. Dan terakhir,

——— Thibbun Nabawi

tidaklah engkau menemukan jalan yang dilalui oleh mereka yang mencari Rabb semesta alam, melainkan engkau akan mendapati Al-Fatihah di awal dan di akhirnya.

Demi Allah! Al-Fatihah jauh lebih penting dari apa yang telah kami tekankan. Seorang hamba yang berpegang teguh pada Al-Fatihah, memahaminya dengan cara yang benar, menjadikannya sebagai obat yang sempurna, perisai, perlindungan, dan cahaya petunjuk. Ia memahami maknanya sebagaimana mestinya. Dialah yang tidak akan terjerumus ke dalam bid'ah, atau shirk, atau terserang penyakit hati kecuali sebentar saja!

Al-Fatihah adalah kunci utama bagi perbendaharaan bumi maupun surga. Namun tidak setiap orang mengetahui cara menggunakan kunci ini untuk mengakses perbendaharaan tersebut. Jika mereka yang mencari perbendaharaan ini mampu mengungkap rahasia surah ini [dalam Al-Qur'an] dan memperoleh pengetahuan tentang maknanya, niscaya mereka akan melengkapi gigi kunci tersebut dan mudah mengakses perbendaharaan itu.

Kami yakin dengan pernyataan yang telah kami kemukakan di sini karena semuanya benar. Allah memiliki Hikmah yang Sempurna dalam menyembunyikan rahasia-rahasia [Al-Fatihah] dari hati kebanyakan umat manusia, sebagaimana Dia memiliki hikmah yang sempurna dalam menyembunyikan perbendaharaan bumi dari mereka.

Perbendaharaan tersembunyi di bumi dikelilingi oleh setan-setan yang menghalangi umat manusia dari perbendaharaan itu. Hanya jiwa-jiwa yang baik yang mampu mengalahkan setan-setan ini dengan Iman yang Sejati, yang merupakan senjata yang tidak dapat ditahan oleh setan. Namun, kebanyakan jiwa manusia bukan dari golongan ini (tidak benar-benar beriman). Oleh karena itu, mereka tidak dapat menolak kejahatan atau mengalahkannya untuk memperoleh harta benda mereka, karena, "Barangsiapa membunuh seorang pejuang musuh maka harta bendanya menjadi miliknya."

2. Faghiyah (Bunga Pacar)

Faghiyah, bunga pacar, adalah salah satu jenis wewangian terbaik. Faghiyah bersifat panas dan kering yang ringan serta sedikit menyebabkan sembelit. Ketika Faghiyah diletakkan di antara lipatan pakaian wol, ia melindunginya dari jamur dan tungau. Selain itu, Faghiyah digunakan dalam salep untuk mengatasi kelumpuhan wajah dan aneurisma (pelebaran sebagian dinding arteri), sementara minyaknya membantu organ-organ tubuh dan merelaksasi saraf.
content_ar:
There are several types of ‘Anbar: white, gray, red, yellow, green, blue, black and multicolored. The best type of the ‘Anbar is gray, then the blue and then the yellow in color, while the black ‘Anbar is the worst type.

People have conflicting opinions regarding the origin of ‘Anbar, where some people said that it is a plant that grows on the seabed and which sea reptiles eat and then discard to later be thrown on the seashore. Some people say that ‘Anbar is the waste of sea creatures that looks like cow manure. Some people even said that it is a type of foam that the sea discards on the shore. The author of the 'Qanoon' discounted the last two opinions but said that the amber might originate from an undersea spring.

‘Anbar is hot and dry and strengthens the heart, the mind and the senses. It In addition strengthens the body and helps relieve facial paralysis, hemiplegia (paralysis), phiegmy ailments, stomach and flatulence. ‘Anbar In addition helps open various clogs if it is used as an ointment or as a drink. When it is inhaled, ‘Anbar will relieve cold symptoms, headaches and migraines.

5. 'Ud (Indian Aloe Tree)

The Indian 'U’d comes in two types. One type is used for medicinal purposes, which is called Al-Kust and some people called it Al-Qust. We will mention this type under the letter Qaf’ The second type of 'Ud is called Aluwwah, aoe wood, which is used as perfume.

Imam Muslim narrated in his Sahih that Ibn "Umar used to bum dry aloe wood along with some Kafur (camphor), and states that رسول الله ﷺ used to do the same. In addition, رسول الله ﷺ has described the bounties that the people of Paradise will be enjoying, such as having the aloe wood.

The 'Ud is hot and dry in the third degree, opens the clogs and does away with gas. In addition, 'Ud dries unnecessary moisture while strengthening the intestines and brings relief and comfort to the heart. ‘Ud In addition helps the mind, sharpens the senses, constipates and helps relieve the enuresis, bed wetting that result from coldness of the prostate.

Ibn Samjun said, "There are several kinds of 'Ud, and they all carry the general name of Aluwwah. 'Ud is used in and out of the body and is bumed alone or with other substances. There is a medicinal significance when the 'Ud is mixed with Kafur (camphor), as each of them makes the other milder. In addition, burning the 'Ud helps

cleanse the air, which is one of the six necessary elements for the body's well-being."

It was reported that the 'Ados (lentils) was described as the lust of the Jews that they preferred over Manna and quails.

The 'Ados is the companion of garlic and onions. It is cold and dry and has two opposing effects, one that constipates and one that works as a laxative. The skin of the 'Ados is hot and dry in the third degree and In addition works as a laxative. The benefit in the lentils is concentrated in the peelings, and this is why whole lentils are more benefici2) than ground lentils, less heavy on the stomach and less harmful.

Lentils cause black bile and harm the melancholy profoundly, along with having a negative effect on the nerves and the eyesight.

‘Adas produces thick blood; and those who suffer from black bile should avoid eating it, for when they eat lentils excessively, the lentils will beget obsession, leprosy, quartran fever (a fever that occurs on every fourth day), and other ailments. However, eating lentils with chard and large amounts of grease will lessen their negative side effects. In addition, one should avoid eating

~———~ The Prophetic Medicine

lentils with sweets, because lentils could cause clogs in the liver in this case. Further, eating 'Ados on a regular basis causes harm to the eyesight because they are very dry. Lentils In addition cause urine retention, cold swellings and excessive flatulence. The best type of 'Ados is the fat, white 'Ados that digests faster.

Some ignorant people claimed that Prophet Tbrahim used to cook lentils for his guests. However, the Qura'an mentioned that he hosted his guests with a fat roasted calf.

The Ghaith is mentioned in the Qura'an in many instances. The word Ghaith is soft on the ear and delightful for the body and the soul. The ears like to hear the word Ghaith, while the hearts enjoy its falling.

Rainwater is the best type of water there is and the softest, most beneficial and most blessed. This is especially the case when the rainfall is accompanied by lightning and thunder and is then collected in mountainous areas.

Rainwater is lighter than the other types of water because it is fresh and did not remain on the ground for a

jong time, in which case it would acquire some of the earth's dryness and hard substances. This is why rainwater gets spoiled quickly because it is pure and light.

There are two opinions regarding which is softer and lighter: rainwater that fal{s :n the spring or winter.

Those who prefer winter rainwater say that in winter, the sun's heat is less and it thus evaporates the softest parts of the seawater. In addition, the air then would be clean and void of dust, and consequently, would not be polluted. Hence, rainwater will not dissolve any pollutants while falling, and this is why rainwater is the softest and the lightest.

Those who prefer spring rainwater say that the hot sun then evaporates heavy substances in the air and makes the air itself lighter and cleaner. In this case, rainwater will be the lightest and the softest, at a time when the plants, the trees and the air become ready to receive rainfall.

Ash-Shafey narrated * that Anas bin Malik said, "Once, we were with النبي ﷺ sg when the rain fell. النبي ﷺ b removed his outer garment (unti! the rain fell on him) saying:

It has just come from its Lord."

-——— The Prophetic Medicine

We mentioned النبي ﷺ's guidance in invoking الله for rain and stated that he used to seek the blessings [that الله endows] in the rain when it falls.

The Letter Foo 1, Fatihah AJ-Kitab (the First Chapter in the القرآن الكريم)

Fatihah is the mother of the Qura'an, the seven frequently recited Versus that النبي ﷺ ste was given and the ultimate cure and beneficial remedy that contains the prefect Rugiah, Islamic prayer formula. The Fatihah is the key to acquiring the richness, success and strength. The Fatihah In addition removes sadness, depression, anguish and fear. Only those who appreciate the value of the Fatihah and give it its due consideration, reciting it as it should be recited and knowing the secret of its value as a medicine and as a cure, will acquire such bounties.

One of the الصحابة unveiled a few of the secrets of the Fatihah when he used it as a Rugyah for scorpion stings. The affected person was instantly cured and النبي ﷺ sn asked the Companion:

"How did you know it is a cure?"

They are successful ones who uncover some of the secrets of the Fatihah and what it contains of Tawhid, knowing الله and His Names, Attributes, Actions and

Decisions. Those who acquire knowledge of what the Fot/hoh contains of affirming the religion, Predestination, Resurrection, الله's Oneness in worship and in Lordship and trusting and depending on He Who owns ail affairs, the praise and all pure things and to Whom everything must return. Those who acquire the habit of showing meekness to الله seeking correct guidance which is the basis of the ultimate happiness in this and the Next Life. Those who acquire knowledge in the connection between the meanings contained in the Fatihah and acquiring the good and fending off the harm of both lives. Those who understand that their ultimate well-being and receiving the perfect Favor of الله are all linked to implementing these meanings. It is they who will be able to substitute the Fatihah in place of many medicines and use it as an Islamic prayer formula {Rugiah), and will use it to open the doors of goodness and drive away the elements of evil.

Understanding this subject requires a new nature, a new heart and a new type of Faith. By الله! You will not find any evil statement, nor misguiding innovation, but the Fatihah will contain what nullifies and refutes it with the best, most correct and most direct manner. In addition, you will not find a door that leads to acquiring divine knowledge, correct guidance of the heart and the remedy of the soul against its ills, but that the Fatihah will possess its key and the method to best use it. Finally,

——— The Prophetic Medicine

you will not find a path on which those who seek the Lord of the Worlds are passing, but you will find the Fatihah in its beginning and end.

By الله! The Fatihah is much more important than what we have emphasized. The slave who holds fast ts the Fatihah, comprehends it in the proper manner, relies on it as a perfect remedy, a shield, immunity, and as a light of guidance. He understands its implications as they should be understood. It is he who will not fall into an innovation, or Shirk, or catch an ailment in the heart except briefly!

The Fatihah is the ultimate key for the treasures of the earth and Paradise, as well. But not every person knows how to use this key so as to have access to these treasures. If those who seek these treasures were able to uncover the secrets of this chapter [in the Qura'an] and acquire knowledge of its implications, they would add teeth to the key and would have easy access to these treasures.

We are certain of the statements that we have asserted herein because they are true. الله has Perfect Wisdom in hiding the secrets [of Al-Fatihah'} from the hearts of the majority of humankind, just as He has a perfect Wisdom in hiding the treasures of the earth from them.

The hidden treasures of the earth are surrounded by the devils that stand between humankind and these treasures. Only the good souls will be able to defeat these devils with True Faith, which is the weapon that the devils cannot wiihstand. However, the majority of the souls of mankind are not of this type (are not truly faithful). Therefore, they cannot resist the evil or defeat them to acquire their possessions for, "Whoever kills a combatant will have His possessions.”

2. Faghiyah (Henna Blossom)

Faghiyah, henna blossom, is one of the best kinds of perfumes, Faghiyah is mild in its hotness and dryness and constipates mildly. When Faghiyah is placed between folded wool clothes it protects them from mold and mites. In addition, Faghiyah is used in ointments against facial paralysis and aneurysm (dilatation of a portion of the wall of an artery), while its oil helps the organs and relaxes the nerves.
